notes: Skip codevetter + protein-index (other agents). Skip private tooling (email-manager, reader library). Contact email is AgentMail inbox.

products.name: RolePatch
products.tagline: AI resume tailoring scored against the job description
products.description: RolePatch scores resume fit against a job description, rewrites bullets for the role, and helps with cover letters, company research, and interview prep. Built for job seekers who want role-specific materials instead of generic AI fluff.

products.name: High Signal
products.tagline: Daily tech, startup, and finance brief with hit-rates
products.description: High Signal publishes a free daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance — five sections with inline hit-rates on market calls, a public track record, and no signup required for the brief.

products.name: Karte
products.tagline: Link-in-bio registry for humans and AI agents
products.description: Karte is a link-in-bio registry for humans and AI agents. Publish trust cards with public manifests at /{slug}/agent.json so agents can discover, verify, and interact with profiles programmatically.

products.name: Significant Hobbies
products.tagline: Life planner for private rituals and public living
products.description: Significant Hobbies is a life planner for private daily rituals and public living — hobbies, bucket lists, and side quests tracked over time with public exploration.

products.name: Materia
products.tagline: Evidence-graded body, remedy, and compound reference
products.description: Materia is an evidence-graded reference for remedies organized by body part — body → condition → remedy → compound → study, with citations. Ad-free; not medical advice.

products.name: PostTrainLLM
products.tagline: Mac-local LLM specialist factory and WebGPU playground
products.description: PostTrainLLM is a Mac-local LLM specialist factory — post-training and runtime that fits on one Mac (MLX), plus a browser WebGPU playground for local model experimentation.

products.name: Foundry (SaaS Maker)
products.tagline: Personal product fleet showcase and open operating layer
products.description: Foundry (SaaS Maker) is Sarthak Agrawal's personal product fleet showcase — shipped apps on custom domains plus the open-source operating layer (CLI, cockpit, deploy tooling) that runs them.

products.name: Starboard
products.tagline: GitHub stars organizer with semantic search
products.description: Starboard organizes GitHub stars with semantic search so developers can find the right starred repo again without scrolling endless lists.

products.name: EverythingRated
products.tagline: Multi-axis ratings for directories and catalogs
products.description: EverythingRated is a multi-axis rating tool for structured directories and catalogs — decisions with explicit trade-offs, not single star averages.

products.name: researchPapers
products.tagline: Search and analytics over ~488k CS papers
products.description: researchPapers is an academic paper platform over a high-citation OpenAlex Computer Science corpus — semantic search, analytics, and RAG-style answers across ~488k papers.

products.name: Pace
products.tagline: On-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen
products.description: Pace is an on-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen and acts with local context — screen-aware assistance without shipping everything to the cloud.

products.name: AI Gateway
products.description: AI Gateway is an OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway fronting free-tier models across multiple providers — one API for multi-provider free inference.

products.name: LoopTV
products.tagline: TV-style random player for curated video channels
products.description: LoopTV is a lean-back TV-style random video player for curated channels — click and watch without decision fatigue.

products.name: MAL Explorer
products.tagline: Anime and manga discovery with multi-axis filters
products.description: MAL Explorer helps discover anime and manga with multi-axis filtering and watchlists beyond single-score rankings.

products.name: Chess Coach
products.tagline: AI-coached chess practice in the browser
products.description: Chess Coach is AI-coached chess practice in the browser with coaching feedback for improving players.

products.name: SWE Interview Prep
products.tagline: SWE learning OS with FSRS spaced repetition
products.description: SWE Interview Prep is a software engineering learning OS with FSRS spaced repetition, drills, and feedback for interview prep.

products.name: psi-swarm
products.description: psi-swarm runs distributional Lighthouse / PageSpeed audits with grounded performance analysis across realistic device and network presets.
